text: Recent telemetry on T-020 has shown anomalous behaviour. Run an anomaly check, then re-forecast remaining useful life conditioned on those findings, and create a work order whose scope and priority match the forecasted condition over the next 90 days.
characteristic_form: The answer should report the anomaly findings for T-020, the RUL forecast at the 90-day horizon, and create a work order whose priority and scope explicitly reflect the forecasted condition (e.g. emergency vs short-term corrective).
